entry.title: New OTHER TRANSACTION IDV W15QKN1891008 awarded to ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY INTERNATIONAL for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: DOTC OTA BASE AGREEMENT. THIS AGREEMENT HAS A TERM OF 10 YEARS WITH A REASSESSMENT AFTER YEAR 5. AT TIME OF AWARD OF THE BASE OTA, THERE WILL BE $0 OBLIGATED AND NO PROJECTS WILL BE AWARDED
